gigapan.description:
The Burning Man, 2012, from a Boom Lift 60 feet in the air.

A dust storm hit as I was capturing this image, and the white balance shifted, which is why the sky color varied in different places.

I have another set of images to stich, and I will edit the images. Search on the tag bme2012
